My lord! The emperor has abdicated, and now his infant son Antoku sits upon the Chrysanthemum Throne. Born to a Taira mother, his ascension is the result of their scheming; their audacity truly knows no bounds! Prince Mochihito - the rightful heir - has issued a call to arms against the usurpers. Now, more than ever, it is vital that we move to free Japan from villainy!
